metadata.title: CD Projekt Millionaires and Their Shamans. Death of an Ayahuasca Ceremony Participant.
metadata.description: Death during an Ayahuasca ceremony, covering up tracks, and shocking behind-the-scenes of the world of CD Projekt creators.
metadata.ogAlt: CD Projekt Millionaires and Their Shamans. Death of an Ayahuasca Ceremony Participant.

header.lead: Ayahuasca, police raids, and a tragedy that no one was supposed to know about. Publicly available files and registers reveal how the creators of 'The Witcher' game funded the shamanic underground.

article.p1: In 2020, media were flooded with reports of a group of Polish shamans being busted in Hermanovice, Czech Republic. A police raid, the arrest of **Jarosław and Karolina Kordys**, and subsequent harsh sentences – 8.5 and 5.5 years in prison for running an illegal business of organizing so-called ceremonies where an exotic psychedelic – ayahuaska – was served to clients.
article.p2: Ayahuasca is a traditional Amazonian plant brew with powerful hallucinogenic effects. Due to its high content of DMT – a psychedelic substance that induces intense visions and altered states of consciousness – its possession and administration are prohibited in Poland and the Czech Republic. The finale of the Kordys' media spectacle was their pardon by the Czech president after two years of imprisonment.
article.p3: The curtain fell, the topic went quiet. But is this really the end of the story? In the shadow of this high-profile trial, a second one was taking place – quiet and lightning-fast, ending in a discreet verdict that not a single word was mentioned in the media. An analysis of court documents leads to astonishing conclusions.
article.p4: In the border town of Janov, a second, twin ayahuasca center operated, the co-owner of which turned out to be a billionaire – **Michał Kiciński**.
article.pWitnessB1: In the extensive and publicly available justification for the verdict of Jarosław Kordys, the figure of witness **Bartosz B.** appears. According to the files:
article.caseFileWitnessB1: Witness B. regarding the accused [Jarosław Kordys] stated that he has known him for about 8 years, and they met in the Netherlands. Witness B. confirmed that he himself had conducted workshops in the past, and is currently subject to a police investigation in Krnow specifically because of the ceremonies.
article.pWitnessB2: The files also reveal the scale of the charges against **Bartosz B.**:
article.caseFileWitnessB2: (...) the mentioned individual was being investigated in connection with the crime of unauthorized production and other handling of narcotic substances (...) as he was alleged to have ordered in 2014 a postal shipment to his address intercepted at the Leipzig airport, Germany, containing 4.5 kg of DMT, and on June 6, 2018, a postal shipment containing 2000 g of mescaline and 38.6 g of DMT was seized in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.
article.pWitnessB3: An intriguing fragment concerns the __ownership of the base__. The documents state:
article.caseFileOwnership:
(...) a family building in the town of **Janov** (...), which is partially used for permanent residence and partially as a commercial accommodation facility.

Witness **[Bartosz B.]** confirmed that in Janov he is the owner of one-tenth of the property.
article.pOwnershipKicinski: In the Czech Republic, land registers are __public__ and for a small fee, one can download its historical extract. The downloaded document leaves no doubt: in the years 2012–2023, the co-owners of the ayahuasca property were:
article.pOwnershipKicinskiConclusion1: The second name – **Dawid** – perfectly fills the gap in the anonymized abbreviation **Michał D. K.**
article.pOwnershipKicinskiConclusion2: !!The partner of the shaman was the creator of The Witcher – one of the richest Poles.!!
article.pEavesdropping1: A breakthrough in the case of the organizers of ayahuasca ceremonies in 2020 came thanks to police operational techniques. Kordys' phone was under constant surveillance, and officers listened live when on August 24, 2020, a nervous exchange took place between **Badowski and Kordys**.
article.pEavesdropping2: Kordys called Badowski clearly alarmed by the news that had reached him. He feared that the tragedy being whispered about behind the scenes could destroy their empire. The court, in the justification for the verdict, precisely reconstructs this moment:
article.caseFileConversation: the accused [Jarosław Kordys] discusses with B. that information reached him that a woman died in the Janov facility.
article.pEavesdropping3: The conversation also touches upon a threat from a third party – the men discuss a blackmailer who wants to go to the police. Kordys directly asks his partner:
article.caseFileQuestion: What threat is our work in?
article.quoteConversationSource: Source: Justification for the verdict of Kordys, case ref. 30 T 5/2020
article.quoteConversationText: „Their conversation shows that they were not essentially concerned with the fact of the death itself, but rather with the fear that it would not attract police attention.”
article.pEavesdropping4: For the court, this was key evidence that the defendants were running an illegal business, not a spiritual activity – the death of a person was merely bad for business to them.
article.pEavesdropping5: The cynicism of this conversation reaches its peak moments later. As soon as they established a strategy to silence the rumors, they immediately moved on to the logistics of drug deliveries. The court notes that immediately after the speculations about death and blackmail, the interlocutors return to business:
article.caseFileContinuation: Then in the conversation they discuss orders for «tea» from the jungle and whether they will «not mess it up» for them, getting excited about a recording from the supplier who is «sitting in the jungle and cooking».
article.pEavesdropping6: For the police officers who heard this in real time, the message was clear: a tragedy could have occurred in the facility, and the perpetrators were only worried about the continuity of supplies.
article.pEavesdropping7: Just two days after this phone call, on August 26, 2020, Czech police officers entered the Janov estate. The results of the search were described in the Kordys verdict:
article.caseFileSearch: items were secured at the property... besides marijuana, substances containing DMT with a volume of approximately 2 kg were also secured.
article.pEavesdropping8: During the police intervention, 15 Polish citizens were identified there as having taken part in the ceremony. Among them were regulars and close friends of Badowski – **Krzysztof Stefanek** and **Magdalena Drzewińska**, whose presence at the moment of the arrival of services is significant in the context of their later role in this story.
article.pPriceOfFreedom1: When on August 26, 2020, Czech police entered the property in Janov, belonging to **Bartosz Badowski** and billionaire **Michał Kiciński**, Jarosław Kordys in Hermanovice still felt safe. He did not yet know that the clock had started ticking towards his own catastrophe. Just 7 weeks after the quiet raid on Badowski, the police knocked on the Kordys'.
article.pPriceOfFreedom2: On October 15, 2020, the idyll at their center was interrupted by the sound of stun grenades. The Czech anti-terrorist unit did not play around: masked officers with long weapons stormed the building, throwing the future heroes of a high-profile scandal to the ground.
article.videoArrestCaption: Recording of the police raid on the center in Hermanovice (15.10.2020)
article.pPriceOfFreedom3: What happened within these less than two months? The answer lies in one Czech legal term:
article.legalNoteDohoda: A Czech criminal procedure allowing the accused to voluntarily submit to a penalty in exchange for a lighter sentence, without conducting a full evidentiary trial and calling witnesses.
article.pPriceOfFreedom4: **Bartosz „Badi” Badowski**, partner of one of the richest Poles, quickly understood his situation. In the face of the secured evidence – including 2 kilograms of substances with DMT and marijuana – he chose a strategy that was to protect him from many years in prison. He decided to buy his freedom.
article.pPriceOfFreedom5: The agreement allowed his file to be closed without calling witnesses, which in practice meant that the mechanisms of the Janov center's operation never echoed in public debate, protecting Badowski from a crossfire of questions and testimonies that could also sink his silent partner.
article.pPriceOfFreedom6: The price of Badowski's freedom turned out to be high for his industry colleague. Badi's testimony was invaluable evidence for the prosecution, allowing the chain of circumstantial evidence in the Kordys case to be closed.
article.pPriceOfFreedom7: By virtue of a verdict dated November 2, 2021, **Bartosz Badowski** was found guilty of the crime of unauthorized production and other handling of narcotic substances.
article.caseFileBadowskiVerdictTitle: Findings of the Conviction of Bartosz B.
article.caseFileBadowskiVerdict:
at least from an unspecified date in 2015 until August 26, 2020 [...] he offered, organized and in at least 441 cases realized four-day and ten-day stays at irregular intervals [...] aimed at so-called spiritual exercises

he made available to the participants for use an unspecified amount of psychotropic substances, namely so-called ayahuasca containing dimethyltryptamine (DMT) and so-called marijuana containing tetrahydrocannabinol (THC)

he stored a total of 1902.79 grams of plant material (...), which contained a total of 37.24 grams of the active substance dimethyltryptamine (DMT) and 92.29 grams of the so-called drug marijuana.
article.pPriceOfFreedom8: While Jarosław Kordys was sentenced to 8.5 years of imprisonment, Bartosz Badowski, whose case concerned the same practice, the same substances, region and duration of activity, ended the case with a suspended sentence thanks to the agreement and cooperation with the justice system.
article.pSilence1: Although Badowski ceased his shamanic activities, the property in Janov did not become empty – the previously mentioned **Krzysztof Stefanek** and **Magdalena Drzewińska** moved in with him. Their presence at **Badi's** side at that time casts a shadow on their later role; they were not, after all, innocent observers, but people who, despite being present during the police intervention themselves, remained loyal to the former shaman.
article.pSilence2: Being so close to Badowski, they perfectly knew the __dark secret of Ilona's death__. Their decision to move in with a man who, in the face of tragedy, was worried about the continuity of supplies, proves that they fully accepted the rules of the __conspiracy of silence__.
article.pKicinski1: In the shadow of these verdicts, the role of the silent partner remains unexplained. **Michał Kiciński** is not a character who has only heard about ayahuasca – he became its unofficial ambassador in the Polish mainstream media. In numerous interviews (including for Focus, Newsweek), he describes the mechanisms of psychedelics' action with extraordinary precision. Kiciński publicly talks about the lessons of humility that medicine gave him, about meetings with shamans and about how the jungle brew opens a new reality.
article.pullQuoteKicinski: After ayahuasca, there is a chance not to lie to yourself.
article.pErrorWithBadi1: **Michał Kiciński's** confrontation with law enforcement agencies took formal shape in the fall of 2023. On September 21, 2023, the billionaire personally received a summons to appear for questioning as a witness. It was to take place on October 18, 2023. The summons clearly stated that the interrogation would concern Janov.
article.pErrorWithBadi2: The billionaire's reaction to the interest of law enforcement agencies was instantaneous. He turned directly to the author of the notification – sending him an e-mail message with a proposal for a kind of penance. Instead of prosecutorial explanations, he offered a transfer for a charitable purpose, calling the years of illegal practice youthful naivety.
article.caseFileEmail: (...) This is how I can pay for my mistake with Badi. Give me a Foundation or Association (preferably associated with a hospice or orphanages, because I see a sea of needs and a lot of suffering there) and I will voluntarily pay the donation amount there, as part of an Apology to the universe, for my youthful naivety and lack of insight. The Foundation / Association must be recognized and with traditions, and not some shell organization. I will send you the transfer confirmation.
article.pErrorWithBadi3: The interrogation took place a week before the date indicated on the summons – October 11, 2023 at 3:00 PM at the District Police Headquarters Warsaw II. In the protocol, Kiciński adopts a line based on a lack of awareness as to the nature of the activities conducted on his property.
article.caseFileStatement: I have no knowledge of what was happening on my farm, in which I am a 90% shareholder (...) I was renting out this property.
article.pErrorWithBadi4: When a key question was asked during the proceedings about his own participation in ayahuasca ceremonies in Janov, the answer was laconic:
article.caseFileParticipationTitle: Answer to the question about participation
article.caseFileParticipation: I did not participate in such ceremonies in the years 2016-2023, and as for the earlier period I refuse to answer
article.pKicinskiPeru: In the context of the testimonies given, it is worth noting that the billionaire is the owner of the luxury Munay Sonqo center in Peru, which he has mentioned many times in interviews.
article.pKicinskiPeru2: Unlike in Europe, Peruvian law allows for commercial ayahuasca ceremonies. Kiciński's center still offers fully open and professional sales of services with a profile twin to those that are prohibited in the Czech Republic, which is still displayed on the website.
article.pKicinskiPeru3: The fact that Kiciński, at the time of the interrogation, was managing a legal ayahuasca business in South America, calls into question his declared ignorance as to the profile of activities in Janov.
article.pBadowskiCorrespondence: This is how **Bartosz Badowski** himself describes the cooperation:
article.caseFileBadowskiEmail: I sent the transfers from my ING account, which I have to this day [...]. Title „rent”. (...) As long as I was earning - I shared the profit. (...) Michał knew exactly what was happening on the farm and drew profits from it for many, many years. (...) I am also considering a visit to the Police in the Czech Republic - I bore legal consequences for conducting ceremonies, but Kiciński - none. Even though it was he who derived the greatest profits, he was above me and was the majority owner of the farm.
article.pPhilanthropist1: In November 2025, a video recorded a year earlier appears on the YouTube channel Osada Natury Zew, in which the current host, Krzysztof Stefanek, spins a tale about the creation of the Settlement. In a rural setting, with a smile on his face, he builds a narrative about a wonderful coincidence and a mysterious benefactor.
article.pPhilanthropist2: Stefanek mentions how, together with a group of friends, he helped to sort out ownership issues so that the object would be in one pair of hands. Stefanek dates the key moment of this story with extraordinary precision:
article.caseFileStefanek: Eventually, on October 23, 2023, this man called us and said that he and his wife had decided that they would like to donate this place.
article.pPhilanthropist3: Stefanek presents this as a result of the donor's research, who was allegedly charmed by the vision of non-profit activity.
article.videoStefanekCaption: Krzysztof Stefanek talks about the wonderful receipt of a donation (Material from 2025)
article.pPhilanthropist4: However, the calendar of legal events destroys this romantic myth, revealing a nervous haste in getting rid of a hot potato:
article.timelineItem1: **Michał Kiciński** receives a summons for questioning regarding Janov.
article.timelineItem2: A week before the visit to the police station, he buys out the 10% share in the property from Bartosz Badowski for 160,000 PLN. To get rid of the entire center with one signature, he must first become its sole owner.
article.timelineItem3: The billionaire stands before the police. For the record, he refuses to testify about his past in this place.
article.timelineItem4Text: Just 12 days after the troublesome interrogation, when the ownership formalities with Badi are already completed, a phone call is made to Stefanek with an offer to give away property worth millions for free.
article.timelineItem5: The finale of the operation. Kiciński formally transfers Janov in the form of a donation. The property goes to a non-profit association – a front shell organization, managed by people who for years were part of this practice. The billionaire gets rid of the evidence, and the new owners gain a base for further activity under a new banner.
article.pPhilanthropist5: The cynicism of this situation is deepened by the fact that the recipients were not accidental ecology enthusiasts. **Krzysztof Stefanek**, who talks in the film about reversed logic and the beauty of volunteering, and his partner **Magdalena Drzewińska** in reality perfectly knew the dark history of Janov and the secret of Ilona's death. By accepting the donation, they were taking over not only the land, but also the __silence__.
article.pPhilanthropist6: Ultimately, the strategy proved successful. The investigation was discontinued before it began, and the property, which could be subject to forfeiture as an instrument of crime, was safely parked in the association. Kiciński remained an anonymous philanthropist, and Stefanek – the guardian of a new, clean settlement.
article.pPhilanthropist7: People who consciously profited from the tragedy were those for whom __covering up the truth__ became the foundation of their new, lucrative reality. Under the banner of the non-profit organization **Stowarzyszenie Natury Zew**, **Michał Kiciński**, **Stefanek** and **Drzewińska** later lived from organizing holiday stays with a price list of donations instead of receipts, lying to their guests and publicly to everyone who comes across their idyllic videos. And after all, the compensation to the universe was supposed to go to a hospice, and not to a **shell organization**.
article.pNydek1: If the case concerned only one billionaire, one could speak of a coincidence or an unlucky choice of tenants. However, slightly further from Janov, in the town of Nýdek, another twin center operated.
article.pNydek2: Witness accounts indicate that regular ceremonies of a nature similar to those at Kordys' and Badowski's took place at the property in Nýdek, conducted by Piotr Bonawentura Tracz. Although the center's website no longer exists, the Wayback Machine internet archive has preserved snapshots of the tribunydek.com website. Descriptions of the workshops clearly indicate that the property was used for work with psychedelics.
article.pNydekQuestion: Now that we know what this house was, the key question becomes: who did it belong to?
article.pNydek3: An analysis of the Czech land registers brings a sensational discovery. The owner of this next shamanic temple – exactly at the time when the website invited for ceremonies – was the second of the duo of billionaires behind the gaming giant, **Marcin Iwiński**. Official documents relentlessly link his name with the infrastructure in which the illegal practice took place.
article.pNydekConclusion: !!This means that not just one, but both of the legendary founders of CD Projekt, possessed properties on the Czech border in which the same illegal substances were offered for a fee.!!
article.pNydek4: Even more puzzling is what happened to this property at the time of threat. When Kordys was arrested on October 15, 2020, the specter of police raids hung over the community. Official documents reveal a disturbing coincidence of dates:
article.timelineNydekItem1: **Marcin Iwiński** purchases the property in Nýdek for the amount of 5,000,000.00 CZK.
article.timelineNydekItem1Details: This property is used for organizing illegal ceremonies with the use of psychedelics administered to participants by Piotr Tracz.
article.timelineNydekItem2: Police assault on the Kordys' center. Panic erupts in the community.
article.pNydek5: The buyer of the luxury property was not another investor, but **Piotr Tracz** himself – the same man who previously played the role of a shaman there.
article.pNydek6: This transaction raises doubts: how did a niche shaman finance the purchase of a luxury villa from one of the richest Poles? The new owner almost immediately changed the formal profile of activity to legal bodywork workshops. The coincidence of this sequence of events with Kiciński's donation in Janov allows us to see a repetitive pattern of owners withdrawing from infrastructure linked to illegal practices.
article.pWiktor1: On March 9, 2026, Onet reveals to the public shocking behind-the-scenes of the activity of the center in Janov, Czech Republic. The journalistic investigation focuses on the death of a 54-year-old participant, **Ilona L.-H.**
article.pWiktor2: According to Onet's findings, a tragedy occurred at the farm in Janov in June 2018. During a night ceremony using ayahuasca, the woman felt terrible, struggling with severe pain and intense vomiting. Despite her critical condition, the organizer did not call for medical help. Telephones had been taken from the participants beforehand, which prevented them from alerting the rescue services themselves.
article.pWiktor3: The one leading the rite, **Wiktor B.**, brother of Bartosz Badowski, was under the influence of marijuana that night. From witness accounts, it appears that after the woman's death, he took immediate action aimed at covering up the incident. He ordered the participants to leave the center immediately. He presented a false version of events to the Czech police, claiming that **Ilona L.-H.** was only a guest and was found dead in the bathroom in the morning. The services initially did not become suspicious, accepting this account as credible.
article.pWiktor4: Some time after the tragic night, **Wiktor B.** convened a meeting for the traumatized participants of the fatal ceremony, in the conduct of which his friend **Joanna Najdowska** helped him. They were then persuaded that for the common good, the events of that night should remain a secret.
article.pWiktor5: For the following years, the false narrative was successfully maintained. Even the closest family of Ilona was convinced for a long time of death from natural causes.
article.pWiktor6: The situation changed only on May 6, 2024, when the District Prosecutor's Office in Częstochowa initiated an official investigation into the center's activities and the circumstances of **Ilona L.-H.**'s death. Just 2 months later, **Wiktor B.** dies under mysterious circumstances.
article.pWiktor7: The man's body was found in the warehouse of the company where he worked as an assembler of server racks. No visible injuries indicating the use of physical force were found on his body. Although more than a year and a half has passed since Wiktor B.'s death, investigators are still waiting for the results of toxicological tests, which are of key importance for explaining whether there were substances in the man's body that could have contributed to his sudden departure. For this reason, the investigation into his mysterious death currently remains suspended.
article.investigationCeremony: Investigation into the organization of ceremonies
article.investigationIlona: Investigation into the death of Ilona L.
article.investigationWiktor: Investigation into the death of Wiktor B.
article.supervisionNote: Supervision over the cases in Częstochowa was taken over by the Deputy District Prosecutor
article.sourceDocumentsSubtitle: The article was written on the basis of public official and court documentation. Below is a full list of case references and links for self-verification.
article.sourceOnetTitle: Shamanic ceremonies, mysterious death and billionaires from "The Witcher"
article.katastrNote: Note: Disclosure of personal data of the parties to the transaction requires logging in via the „Identita občana” option, selecting login via eIDAS.

prokuratura.title: Burglary at the Prosecutor's Office in Wałbrzych. Vanishing Files.
prokuratura.description: Daring burglaries at the District Prosecutor's Office in Wałbrzych. Perpetrators stole files from their own case.
prokuratura.lead: Break-ins, thefts, and disappearing documentation. How perpetrators robbed the prosecutor's office of the investigative files conducted against themselves.
prokuratura.p1: Wałbrzych, a city known for its mysterious undergrounds and legends of the gold train, became the scene of events that could serve as a script for a crime comedy, if it weren't for the fact that they strike at the very foundations of the justice system. In the heart of the city, in the District Prosecutor's Office building, a series of burglaries occurred that exposed the helplessness of security systems.
prokuratura.p2: It all started with a seemingly ordinary, yet daring theft. Unknown perpetrators, taking advantage of the lack of modern monitoring, entered the prosecutor's office archive. Their loot was not money or valuable electronic equipment. The thieves came for something much more valuable – for paper.
prokuratura.p3: From safes that turned out to be armored in name only, files of several multi-threaded economic investigations evaporated. The prosecutors who came to work the next day found only empty folders and an open window.
prokuratura.caseFileReport: Violation of the security seals on the doors to the main archive was found. No signs of the use of explosives. The locks were opened using a so-called "master key". From the cabinets marked with reference numbers PR 123/2023 and PR 456/2023, the entire content of paper documentation along with electronic carriers was removed.
prokuratura.p4: A scandal broke out. Local media buzzed about the incompetence of investigators, and the District Prosecutor's Office immediately initiated explanatory proceedings. A special operational group was appointed, whose task was to find the perpetrators and – more importantly – recover the stolen files.
prokuratura.p5: The new proceedings, conducted under strict supervision, were to be proof that the system can draw conclusions. The files of the new case, concerning the burglary at the prosecutor's office, became a priority. Guards were questioned, telephone connections analyzed, fingerprints collected.
prokuratura.pullQuoteSpokesman: This was a slap in the face of the state. We will not rest until the perpetrators stand before the court and the files return to their place.
prokuratura.p6: For several weeks it seemed that a breakthrough was close. Investigators gathered considerable evidence, including the testimony of an incognito witness who allegedly saw the fleeing perpetrators. All this valuable information went into a new, bulky folder marked with reference number PR 999/2024 - Case of File Theft.
prokuratura.p7: History likes to repeat itself, but in Wałbrzych it repeated itself as a farce. Exactly on the anniversary of the first burglary, the perpetrators struck again. This time they were not looking for economic files. Their goal was one: the files of the case concerning their own burglary.
prokuratura.p8: The burglars showed a great deal of humor or extreme insolence. Not only did they steal the documentation of the PR 999/2024 investigation, but in the empty cabinet they left a note with a short inscription:
prokuratura.noteNote: Thank you for collecting the evidence. They helped us a lot.
prokuratura.caseFileReport2: During the inspection, the absence of folders with reference number PR 999/2024 was found. The perpetrators entered the building the same way as before. The alarm system, which was to be modernized, was still in the testing phase and did not record the event.
prokuratura.p9: The situation became absurd. The Prosecutor's Office in Wałbrzych now had to initiate a third investigation – into the theft of files concerning the theft of files.
prokuratura.p9Conclusion: !!The thieves effectively "cleaned" their record, using the hands of the prosecutors themselves.!!
prokuratura.legalNoteRecidivismDesc: A term coined by local lawyers to describe the practice of repeatedly robbing the same institution of documentation incriminating the perpetrators.
prokuratura.p10: To this day, it hasn't been established how it's possible that the prosecutor's office building was so poorly secured. Was it the result of simple negligence, or perhaps the deliberate action of someone from the inside? One thing is certain – in Wałbrzych, case files have an extraordinary tendency to disappear exactly when they become most dangerous for criminals.

ui.videoCaptionLabel: Video material - evidence in the investigation

sources.kordysVerdict: Justification for the verdict of Kordys, case ref. 30 T 5/2020
